name: CATALYST PHARMACEUTICALS, INC.
business: Catalyst Pharmaceuticals sells FIRDAPSE for Lambert-Eaton myasthenic syndrome, AGAMREE for Duchenne muscular dystrophy, and FYCOMPA for epilepsy. The company has no in-house manufacturing and relies on contract manufacturers and packagers.

exposures.sentence: Protection of our intellectual property and regulatory exclusivities is a strategic priority for our business.

catalysts.event: Trial in patent litigation against Hetero for FIRDAPSE
catalysts.sentence: At present, our pending case against Hetero is currently scheduled to be tried beginning on March 23, 2026.
The second FYCOMPA patent in the Orange Book is U.S. Patent No. 8,772,497 (the '497 patent), which expires on July 1, 2026.

catalysts.event: Additional third-party manufacturer for AGAMREE expected
catalysts.sentence: In that regard, we expect to have an additional third-party manufacturer for the manufacture and supply of AGAMREE before the end of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: DMD incidence in the U.S. is about 1 in 3,600 live male births.
tamClaims.sentence: In the U.S., the incidence of DMD is estimated to be about 1 in 3,600 live male births.

tamClaims.claim: About 3.4 million people in the U.S. have epilepsy.
tamClaims.sentence: In the U.S., about 3.4 million people have epilepsy.
